functionList.parser:
<function mainExpr="^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*(<[^>]*>)?\s*\(" displayMode="$functionName">
^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 8
mod\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 1
<function mainExpr="^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*(<[^>]*>)?\s*\(" displayMode="$functionName">
^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 8
impl\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 1
<function mainExpr="^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*(<[^>]*>)?\s*\(" displayMode="$functionName">
^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 8
(struct|enum|type)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 2
impl\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 1
<function mainExpr="^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*(<[^>]*>)?\s*\(" displayMode="$functionName">
^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 8
trait\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 1
<function mainExpr="^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*)\s*(<[^>]*>)?\s*\(" displayMode="$functionName">
^\s*(#\[[^\]]*\]\s*)*((pub\s+)?(async\s+)?(unsafe\s+)?(extern\s+)?)(fn)\s+([a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*) 8
